NATS_VERSION.description: Specific version of nats to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

NATS_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install NATS. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

NATS_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for NATS to listen on

NATS_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for NATS to listen on

NATS_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for NATS to listen on
